problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Polymer. Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
